title: Vanilla Addons
description: A small mod that adds a few missing features.
body:
This is a small vanilla-plus mod that adds a few features to complement your vanilla gameplay. These features are:
- Emerald and copper armor
- Netherite and Chainmale armor is now craftable with the respective material
- Turtle boots, leggings and chestplate
- Illusioners now actually spawn in raids
